transcript: Stinkfart What are those what do you mean they're my shoes why what's up why is there another man's shoes in my house answer me barbara why do you keep calling me that recently you've been acting so weird can you stop because you're scaring me if you want some some help, we can get you some. But all the words sound strange They can't prove me wrong But I feel their energy But it takes a long While I can't find a way You really test my picture You always hold me're a cheating bitch, you scum, we've been together for years What are you talking about? Just get out I said get out Don't take out Get out, and take your fucking shoes with you J'y suis, je me dis. I lose I lose What the fuck do you want? Close the door. You won. I told you not to come back. I'm your son. How could you throw your own son out of this house? Why do you keep saying you're my son? You're not my- I am your son! Lucas, you were in that crash as well, weren't you? Lucas, I understand you're going through a lot. That's why you're going to get special treatment. I'll be here with you every week. So explain to me, what happened from the start?
